finding: engine.run() computes returncode then returns hardcoded 0; multi-repo install-workflows.py path reports success even when a repo failed/aborted
proposed_action: return returncode instead of return 0; add test (nonexistent repo -> exit 1)

finding: .created-files.json omits create_setup_artifacts files (gitleaksignore, secret-scan CI, .agents/comms/ skeleton); --undo leaves them behind
proposed_action: fold artifacts (suffix-stripped, no dry-run) into newly_created before save_created_files_record; add rollback test

finding: _install_all/setup catch except Exception; install_into_repo can raise SystemExit (BaseException) which escapes and aborts the batch (breaks R-4)
proposed_action: catch (Exception, SystemExit) in _install_all and setup loop; add isolation test

finding: prompt_and_run_commit(..., artifacts: list[str] = None) annotation vs default mismatch (deferred LSP diagnostic; only instance in engine/cli)
proposed_action: annotate list[str] | None = None; optional signature-guard test

finding: preserved customized shim tagged [already current] -> reported as [no change], indistinguishable from untouched
proposed_action: distinct tag e.g. [preserved: manual edits] + format_output_item mapping; test

finding: save_created_files_record swallows OSError write failure silently, degrading --undo (compounds F5)
proposed_action: log a stderr warning on write failure; test

finding: CSV outputs opened without newline='' -> double blank rows on Windows
proposed_action: open with newline=''; test no double blank rows

finding: run_checks PHONY-skip condition '... and target.startswith(.)' always False for reachable names; all/default aggregates not skipped
proposed_action: drop the dead clause so all/default are skipped; test

finding: scan_secrets.redact() reveals up to 8 of N chars for 9-12-char secrets (head4+tail4)
proposed_action: for len<16 mask more aggressively so short tokens are not near-fully revealed; test redact('abcdefghi') exposes <=4 chars

finding: merge_pointer_block native branch lacks else for verb -> latent UnboundLocalError only if a 5th action added
proposed_action: optional: add else mirroring the AGENTS branch
optional: collapse or restore intended asymmetry

finding: parse_describe mis-parses a bare non--long tag; sole caller always uses git describe --long
